commands.description: Starts a real-time telemetry stream to a local web dashboard for monitoring sensor data and motor telemetry.
Overwrites the existing firmware on a remote robot via network connection, bypassing local safety checks.
Runs the current project logic through a physics-based digital twin simulator without requiring physical hardware.
Filters and displays the last 50 lines of the robot's system logs specifically looking for motor-related exceptions.
Adjusts the internal scheduler to prioritize low-latency motor control loops over background telemetry tasks.
